allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import fastapi, uvicorn; print\('fastapi', fastapi.__version__\); print\('uvicorn', uvicorn.__version__\)")
Bash(rm -f telemetry.db checkpoint_auto.json checkpoint_auto.json.* test_ckpt.json test_ckpt.json.*)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import observatory.server; import data.save_load; from genetics.species import SpeciesRegistry, make_founder_signature, write_signature, signature_distance; from behavior.reproduction import _cross_species_accepted; import config; print\('imports OK; INITIAL_SPECIES=%d CROSS_SPECIES_MATE_THRESHOLD=%.2f' % \(config.INITIAL_SPECIES, config.CROSS_SPECIES_MATE_THRESHOLD\)\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import observatory.server; from observatory.analytics import ecology_snapshot; from core.ecology import ResourceEcology; import config; print\('imports OK; ecology cfg: zone=%d cap=%.0f regen=%.3f spawn=%d famine<%.2f' % \(config.ECOLOGY_ZONE, config.ECOLOGY_ZONE_CAPACITY, config.ECOLOGY_REGEN_RATE, config.FOOD_SPAWN_PER_TICK, config.ECOLOGY_FAMINE_FRACTION\)\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import observatory.server, observatory.sim_runner; from core.simulation import Simulation; s=Simulation\(\); [s._tick\(\) for _ in range\(30\)]; import config; print\('OK pop=%d food=%d cfg: cap=%.0f regen=%.3f spawn=%d floor=%d/%d speed_fix_ok' % \(s.world.population\(\), s.world.food_count\(\), config.ECOLOGY_ZONE_CAPACITY, config.ECOLOGY_REGEN_RATE, config.FOOD_SPAWN_PER_TICK, config.MIN_POPULATION_FLOOR, config.RESEED_COUNT\)\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sqlite3; con=sqlite3.connect\('telemetry.db'\); rows=con.execute\('SELECT kind, COUNT\(*\) FROM events GROUP BY kind ORDER BY 2 DESC'\).fetchall\(\); print\('event kinds:'\); [print\(' ',k,c\) for k,c in rows]; print\('max tick:', con.execute\('SELECT MAX\(tick\) FROM events'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import ast,sys; [ast.parse\(open\(f,encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\),f\) for f in ['config.py','entities/clan.py','behavior/diplomacy.py','core/world.py','core/simulation.py','observatory/snapshot.py','data/save_load.py']]; print\('python syntax OK'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k, '->', v[-3:] if v else 'EMPTY'\) for k,v in d.get\('series',{}\).items\(\)]")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f,encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\),f\) for f in ['data/telemetry.py','observatory/snapshot.py']]; print\('PY OK'\)")

PowerShell(Set-Location "d:/Code/Py/Alife"; Write-Output "=== origin/main telemetry.db size \(bytes\) or absent ==="; git cat-file -s origin/main:telemetry.db 2>$null; if \($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0\) { Write-Output "ABSENT on origin/main" }; Write-Output "=== commits \(unpushed\) that touch telemetry.db ==="; git log --oneline origin/main..HEAD -- telemetry.db; Write-Output "=== the 3 unpushed commits ==="; git log --oneline origin/main..HEAD; Write-Output "=== any tracked file >50MB in HEAD ==="; git ls-tree -r -l HEAD | Sort-Object { [int]\($_ -split '\\s+'\)[3] } -Descending | Select-Object -First 5)
